title: Pulse Meter & Storage
description: This meter is used to integrate a storage and records its level, charging and discharging.

inputs.description: For meters with pulse output (S0), connected to digital inputs.
For meters with pulse output (S0), connected to digital inputs.
For meters with pulse output (S0), connected to digital inputs used as frequency counter.
For meters with pulse output (S0), connected to digital inputs used as frequency counter.
Pulse: Meter reading outputs are reset. On: Block is locked.

outputs.description: Current power/flow calculated using inputs (Pd) and (Fd) is output as a positive value. Current power/flow calculated using inputs (Pc) and (Fc) is output as a negative value.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

properties.description: Maximum storage level used for the user interface
If checked, you will be notified if invalid Meter Reading values have been detected. For instance, when a physical counter sends unrealistic values due to transmission errors.
